title: Finite Continuous Maps And Homeomorphism Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite continuous-map bad preimage QF_UF/Alethe regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: For a fixed finite function and codomain open set, preimage membership must agree with membership of the mapped point in the codomain set; the EUF row refutes a malformed preimage table before the finite topology replay checks openness.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional continuity rows only when they add distinct function/preimage congruence pressure; keep arbitrary continuous-image, compactness-preservation, connectedness-preservation, and homeomorphism-invariance theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite topological continuity as deterministic preimage-of-open-set enumeration.
Replay finite continuous-map and homeomorphism witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation over finite functions.
Route malformed finite preimage-membership rows through checked QF_UF/Alethe evidence, then keep the finite topology open-set check in replay.
Keep continuous-image, homeomorphism-invariance, compactness-preservation, and connectedness-preservation theorems marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
